assistant.summary: Rebuilt the notebook around a single descriptive Markdown cell and two CAS-focused math cells for solving \(x^2=2\); all helper code and “REMOVE ME” material have been deleted so the notebook now has exactly three cells.
warnings: 1. Replace the old narrative (including any REMOVE ME text) with a concise, student-facing explanation that matches the new CAS workflow.
2. Set up the equation and capture the exact symbolic solutions in one math cell.
3. Show decimal approximations, verify each root, and factor the polynomial in a follow-up CAS cell.

cells.source: Solve the equation x^2 = 2 using the CAS. Show the exact symbolic solutions, give decimal approximations, then verify each solution and factor the polynomial.

set_decimal_places(6)
N(s1)
N(s2)
simplify(s1^2) = 2
simplify(s2^2) = 2
factor(x^2 - 2)

x^2 = 2
s1, s2 := solve(Eq(x^2, 2), x)
s1, s2
set_decimal_places(6)
N(s1), N(s2)
